title: Green Squadron (disambiguation)
content:
'''Green Squadron''' could mean:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)|Green Squadron]]''', a starfighter squadron used by the early rebel movement and later the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]].
*'''[[Green Squadron (Resistance)|Green Squadron]]''', a starfighter squadron used by the [[Resistance]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Green Squadron (Galactic Republic)|Green Squadron]]''', an [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] unit of [[Aurek-class tactical strikefighter|''Aurek''-class tactical strikefighters]].
*'''[[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadron]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] starfighter squadron that fought in the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
*'''[[Green Squadron (Eyrie Base)|Green Squadron]]''', a Rebel Alliance starfighter squadron that was stationed at [[Eyrie Base]].
*'''[[Green Squadron (New Republic)|Green Squadron]]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] starfighter squadron.
*'''[[Green Squadron (Thurse)|Green Squadron]]''', a New Republic [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] squadron that was part of the ''[[Thurse]]''{{'s}} complement.

{{Disambig}}

}}
